sections.title: B: Original matching practice
sections.instructions: Match each original prompt with the correct ending.

items.sentence: During the class project on Review: Block 11 – Units 21 & 22, Mia wrote ...... to complete the model sentence.
items.answer: D – into some money when her aunt died.

items.sentence: In an original matching item about Review: Block 11 – Units 21 & 22, the best completion is ...... .
items.answer: A – a little money by each month.

items.sentence: Sara checked the matching practice notes and added ...... to the example.
items.answer: H – on house prices coming down soon.

items.sentence: The online lesson included a short sentence about Review: Block 11 – Units 21 & 22: the missing part is ...... .
items.answer: F – by on such a low salary.

items.sentence: During the school club on Review: Block 11 – Units 21 & 22, Nina wrote ...... to complete the model sentence.
items.answer: B – out the cheque to Peardrop Limited, that would be fine.

items.sentence: In an original matching item about Review: Block 11 – Units 21 & 22, the best completion is ...... .
items.answer: E – away free software with every computer.

items.sentence: Iris checked the matching practice notes and added ...... to the example.
items.answer: C – up to buy a new DVD player.

items.sentence: The language lab included a short sentence about Review: Block 11 – Units 21 & 22: the missing part is ...... .
items.answer: G – on now I've lost my job.
